summary: Vibez 654 side-bets backend (8/8 pytest passing), Vibez 654 single-player drawers (Side Bets + Recent Rolls) verified working, Vibe Solo High Roller layout fix verified (coliseum 461x461 fits cleanly above stake bar with 104px gap on 1366x768; 390x390 on 414x896 with no horizontal overflow), and full visual sweep of 22 fullscreen game routes at desktop+mobile completed. Found 5 real defects (1 founder-rule WhatsNewBanner leak, 3 FAB violations on cyber-casino routes, 1 voice-dock FAB on three-card-poker, 1 broken /chess route returning 404). The 178x40 fixed bottom-right element flagged on all routes is the platform 'Made with Emergent' watermark and is NOT app code.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testids 'v654-payout' and 'v654-side-payout' not found in DOM after stand — outcome card may use different testids or only render under specific conditions. Could not verify per spec.
Side bets total testid 'v654-side-bets-total' missing — header instead shows 'SIDE BETS · N PLACED' (count only, not amount total).

ui_bugs.component: Vibez654Game side-bet pick buttons after start
ui_bugs.issue: Could not confirm pick buttons are disabled after game starts — the post-start drawer renders read-only summary list (TRIPLE 6 ₵25 lost / ANY STRAIGHT ₵10 lost) without re-rendering pick buttons. Visually correct (read-only) but the test selector for disabled state returned null.
Top-level /chess route renders 'Not Found' page on both 1366x768 and 414x896 — only /practice/play/chess works. The visual sweep brief lists /chess as a target route.

issues: VIOLATION of founder no-FAB rule: voice-mirror-dock (fixed bottom-left), beta-feedback-toggle (fixed bottom-left), floating-food-menu-trigger (fixed bottom-right circular) all visible on these fullscreen game rooms
WhatsNewBanner is visible on these routes (should be hidden on game routes)
WhatsNewBanner visible (should be hidden on game routes)
WhatsNewBanner visible (should be hidden on game routes — the canonical /vibez-654 correctly hides it)
VIOLATION: game-voice-dock FAB visible at bottom-right (151x46) — only InRoomCommsLauncher pill at top-right is permitted
Faint unidentified fixed bottom-right element (90x24, opacity-30, no testid) — may be an internal debug marker, but founder rule disallows fixed bottom elements on fullscreen game rooms

The 178x40 element at bottom-right (left:1172, top:712) is the platform 'Made with Emergent' badge injected by the preview wrapper — NOT app code. Same 149x25 'log-design-lesson-toggle' bottom-left is opacity-10 and excluded from FAB rule per its testid being in the allowlist.

action_items: Hide WhatsNewBanner on /games/cyber-casino*, /games/vibez-654 (legacy alias) — same rule as /vibez-654
Remove or gate FABs on /games/cyber-casino routes: voice-mirror-dock, beta-feedback-toggle, floating-food-menu-trigger violate the no-FAB-on-fullscreen-game-room rule
Remove game-voice-dock FAB on /three-card-poker (bottom-right) — replace with inline PageActionStrip or move into InRoomCommsLauncher pill
Investigate /chess top-level route returning 'Not Found' — either redirect to /practice/play/chess or render the live chess room
Confirm Vibez654 outcome-card testids: add data-testid="v654-payout" and data-testid="v654-side-payout" to the outcome card so the spec contract is satisfied
Optional: add data-testid="v654-side-bets-total" to the drawer header so the total ₵ value is exposed for tests (currently only the placed-count is shown)
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/vibez_654.py is 545 lines — at the edge of the 700-line guideline but fine; settle/start/roll/history/types all single-responsibility and well-commented.
Side-bet evaluation in _evaluate_side_bets correctly fires only on rolls==1 in the dispatcher — defensive guard prevents re-evaluation on subsequent rolls. Good.
Stake debiting in start_game uses pick_wallet_field_for_debit and unpacks (field, _bal) tuple — matches the bug fix mentioned in the request brief.
Settlement credits gross side-bet payout correctly (stake already debited up-front, only multiplier × amount paid back) — matches gross-payout convention.

Frontend Vibez654Game.tsx uses Drawer pattern — drawers expand/collapse cleanly and lock to read-only after game starts (good UX), but data-testid contract is incomplete (v654-payout, v654-side-payout, v654-side-bets-total missing in DOM).

success_rate.frontend: 75% — drawers work; layout cap works; 5 founder-rule violations + 1 broken route + 3 missing testids

test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! — works against preview URL; balance was sufficient for all start operations.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own ephemeral game rows in vibez_654_games via real /start /roll /stand calls; no manual seeding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend side-bets pipeline is fully green (test_v654_sidebets_iter_2026_05.py — 8/8). The Coliseum sizing fix (line 64-77 in Coliseum.tsx with maxWidth: min(820px,100%,calc(60vh))) is working — verified 461x461 on 1366x768 and 390x390 on 414x896 with NO bottom-stake-bar overlap. Drawers on /vibez-654 work and lock after start. The visual sweep flagged: (a) WhatsNewBanner leak on /games/cyber-casino* and /games/vibez-654, (b) three FAB violations on /games/cyber-casino (voice-mirror-dock, beta-feedback-toggle, floating-food-menu-trigger), (c) game-voice-dock FAB on /three-card-poker, (d) /chess returning 404. NOTE: The 178x40 bottom-right and 149x25 bottom-left fixed elements detected on every route are the platform 'Made with Emergent' watermark and the opacity-10 'log-design-lesson-toggle' debug pill — both are NOT in-app FABs and should be ignored on the next sweep. Screenshots saved to /app/test_reports/screenshots/iter_2026_05/.
rca_of_the_issue: WhatsNewBanner: route-level hide list is only applied to /vibez-654 but not its alias /games/vibez-654 nor /games/cyber-casino*; banner-host component likely lives in a layout wrapper that doesn't read the active route slug. Cyber-casino FABs: voice-mirror-dock, beta-feedback-toggle, floating-food-menu-trigger are mounted at the casino-page level (or higher) instead of inside a non-fullscreen layout — they need to be conditionally suppressed when isFullscreenGameRoom flag is true. /chess 404: Likely a missing route entry in App.tsx — only /practice/play/chess is wired.
